name: Pork Chops and Sweet Potatoes
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F.
2. Boil and slice the sweet potatoes.
3. Season the pork chops with salt and pepper, then dredge in flour.
4. Brown the pork chops in shortening.
5. Melt the butter.
6. Stir in the currant jelly, orange juice, and lemon rind.
7. Add the remaining ingredients, stirring to blend.
8. Arrange the sweet potatoes and pork chops in a casserole dish and cover with 2 tablespoons of sauce.
9. Bake for 30 to 40 minutes, basting occasionally.
